name: claude
description: Use Claude Code from Codex to plan or delegate tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate planning and tasks from Codex to Claude Code
interface.longDescription: Use Claude Code from Codex through a local runtime that supports plan-first delegation, background jobs, status checks, stored results, cancellation, and resume.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude Code to plan this change
Delegate this investigation to Claude Code
Have Claude Code continue the last delegated task
